textByHashes.d6f6c610244264bb663e1966d466e012b2f4c6df: Are you a cook? I need more staff.
textByHashes.0fb7826abe82a96b36638bbc4c8e049dfae85fd8: This is the Hosidius Mess. It was set up to help feed the soldiers from the Shayzien Encampment. Much better than anything they can cook over there.
textByHashes.db2388ccb6bb1e51567cc84cf2d48be7f78d4805: The solders do enough hard work, so it seemed only right not to make them walk all the way across Kourend for a bit of food.
textByHashes.f903e608d1efa38365af76cd39b6d768d678d80f: Anyway, enough chatting. Are you a cook?
textByHashes.7d94e1741d2217bb7e458eb4e8ff30bad6b2325e: Hah! You'll need a level of 20 to cook anything for these soldiers. They're picky about what they eat.
textByHashes.b14266c7cb434372927c975a3c6d6b35acf29813: Good. When you've got more Hosidius favour, come back and I'll have plenty for you to do.
textByHashes.aa344962c82bb048cf9a2b9ca8918d16c35ec06a: Good. The soldiers like stew, meat pies and pineapple pizza. You'll find ingredients in the cupboards.
textByHashes.1730280d8774937d6108f20505b54080fb647208: When you've made something, put it on the buffet tables, and you'll gain experience based on how much the soldiers appreciate them.
textByHashes.999be7818d6d44bf4823d181f0a9d15d4474bfb7: You're not authorised to work in my kitchen.
textByHashes.86647f0759f57842c450d132dd3824487932b546: They're not going to eat anything you've got there. Make them meat pies, stew or pineapple pizza.
textByHashes.0683eef0361b21601d26062151f227f6f9ce8a32: They're not going to eat that. Use the ingredients provided here.
textByHashes.1ef0c6650dbe2e41649b9dc8feb8f51dbdf1f036: They're not going to eat that. Make them meat pies, stew or pineapple pizza.
textByHashes.5630362ff9ee844c5b3e79208bb6579833ed8495: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
